hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | jq -r 'try (.tool_input.file_path) // ""' | grep -qE 'db/migrate/.*\.rb$' && echo '[api-dev hook] Migration file detected. Reminder: run `doppler run -- bundle exec annotaterb models` after db:migrate, and commit the annotated models.' >&2; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r 'try (.tool_input.command) // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(bundle exec rspec|bin/rails db:|bin/rails runner)' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'doppler run'; then echo '[api-dev hook] ⚠️  rspec/rails command without doppler prefix. Tests may fail due to missing ENV vars. Prefer: doppler run --config test -- <cmd>' >&2; fi; exit 0
